generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors collecting temperature data from physical building systems",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors detecting occupancy levels in building spaces",
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]
instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring ambient light levels for visual comfort",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]
instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data streams from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data streams from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]
instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level data streams from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]
instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator controlling HVAC systems in Building Control Systems"
]
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator managing lighting systems in Building Control Systems"
]
instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for HVAC system management in Building Control Systems"
]
instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for lighting system management in Building Control Systems"
]
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with device metadata (sensors, actuators, controllers)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTool, ModelDrivenEngineering
]
instance MiddlewareConfig : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Middleware configuration for Eclipse Hono and Ditto IoT protocols",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]
instance BIMTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tools for creating and validating physical asset models",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity and data ingestion",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]
instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and state handling",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]
instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for high-fidelity 3D visualization",
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]
instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automated generation of digital twin artifacts",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building systems using sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for performance analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]
instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization and visual comfort adjustments using reinforcement learning",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight
]
instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization via reinforcement learning algorithms based on real-time sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]
instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort adjustment based on real-time lighting and occupancy data",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAction
]
instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building systems using Unreal Engine 5",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current status of building systems from sensor data"
]
instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated outcomes for building systems under various scenarios"
]
instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted energy usage patterns for optimization"
]
instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted visual comfort levels based on lighting and occupancy"
]
instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC systems for energy efficiency",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance VisualComfortAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting systems for optimal visual comfort",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of building data in 3D environment"
]
instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building in AECO domain for real-time monitoring and optimization",
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor, HVACActuator, LightingActuator, HVACController, LightingController, BIMModel, MiddlewareConfig, TemperatureData, OccupancyData, LightData, TemperatureDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightDataTransmitted, BIMTool, EclipseHono, Ditto, UnrealEngine5, ModelDrivenEngineering, RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, Interactive3DVisualizationService, RealTimeMonitoringInsight, SimulationInsight, EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, VisualizationInsight, EnergyOptimizationAction, VisualComfortAction
]
instance LivingLabSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment LivingLabBuilding
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin for BCS actuators (e.g., adjusting lighting intensity or HVAC settings) sent through Eclipse Hono and Ditto to the physical building systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous bidirectional data exchange between physical and virtual components for immediate operational updates and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized framework integrating Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine 5 for visualization, and modular services via standardized extension points for holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life cycle phases including design, construction, operation, and refurbishment, with BIM as the semantic backbone for as-designed models and real-time data for as-operated conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness of the digital twin relative to the physical asset."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT-based communication via Eclipse Hono for device connectivity and Ditto for digital twin state management, using standardized IoT protocols for secure data exchange"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards and standardized extension points for service integration, ensuring interoperability across heterogeneous systems and engineering workflows."
]
